name: rubric rule schema validator rejects a rule whose fixable value is outside code whitespace null
command: printf '{"id":"r","name":"r","description":"x","detector":"x","severity":"P1","fixable":"random","semver":"1.0.0"}\n' > rule.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-rule-schema.sh" --rule rule.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_fixable=random' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
